note: Knowledge gate requirements for Civication job offers. This is the History Go side of the dual gate (knowledge_gate). It uses existing History Go quiz/progress signals (quiz_progress[category].completed). jobLearningProfiles.json is the Civication learning side (learning_gate). Category and requirement category IDs MUST be real History Go quiz category IDs.

field_docs.mode: not_required = never blocks. soft_required = can report passed/missing and explain, but does not block offers in this version. required = may block when the resolver can confirm a requirement is missing.
field_docs.requirements[].type: category_quiz_count = count completed quizzes in quiz_progress[category].completed and compare with min_completed.
field_docs.requirements[].category: Must be an existing History Go quiz category id (e.g. politikk, vitenskap, by, naeringsliv).
field_docs.requirements[].min_completed: Number of completed quizzes required in that category.
